text.title: java-spring-boot-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for java-spring-boot-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: @Data on JPA entities — Lombok generates equals/hashCode using all fields.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Entity equality must be based on identity (ID), not value. @Data-generated equals causes incorrect Set behavior for managed entities and can produce infinite loops with bidirectional relationships.

failure-mode.description: Iterating over a collection and accessing a lazy-loaded relationship: users.forEach(u -> u.getOrganization().getName()).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each getOrganization() triggers a separate SELECT. For N users, N+1 queries are issued. Use JOIN FETCH or @EntityGraph to load relationships in one query.
